title: lathyrus luteus
intro: Lathyrus luteus, also known as yellow pea or flat-pea, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lathyrus luteus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even have a potential role in managing certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
